description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise lounge, upholstered in a smooth, dark gray material. The sofa features three segmented backrest cushions, each with a slightly raised headrest for added comfort. The seat cushions are broad and flat, with visible square stitching that adds a subtle geometric pattern to the surface. Both armrests are wide and padded, with the right armrest extending seamlessly into the chaise section. The legs are short and minimally visible, likely made of metal or plastic, providing a low-profile base. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern dark gray sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, segmented backrests, wide padded armrests, and subtle square stitching on the seat cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sectional layout, three backrest cushions, wide armrests, and the chaise on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat cushions, the armrest profile, and the length of the chaise.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented backrest cushions and the continuous back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the chaise extension, the right armrest, and the overall sofa depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached backrest cushions with raised headrests and two large, uniform seat cushions, including a chaise section; all cushions are fixed and feature square stitching.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, wide, and padded, with a straight, boxy profile and height slightly above the seat level; no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of metal or plastic with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, segmented backrest with three sections, each featuring a raised headrest; straight and continuous along the back, with attached cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray upholstery with visible square stitching on the seat and chaise cushions, creating a subtle geometric pattern; smooth texture overall.
